title: Campanopsis robusta
taxonomy: Campanopsis robusta is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This family is commonly known as the bellflower family. Campanulaceae is a large and diverse family of plants that includes around 2,300 species. Further studies on Campanopsis robusta classification can provide insights into its phylogenetic position and potential uses in horticulture.
